description: A citizen is calling the health department to report getting sick after eating at a local restaurant.

nodes.task_description: Gather details from the citizen: restaurant name, date they ate there, what they ate, and their symptoms.

expected_outcome.value: The public health nurse documents all the key information.

nodes.task_description: Log the report in the communicable disease tracking system.

expected_outcome.value: The nurse creates a new case file for the potential foodborne illness.

nodes.task_description: Check the system for other similar reports linked to the same restaurant.

expected_outcome.value: The nurse checks for other cases to see if this is part of a larger outbreak.
